metadata.description: AltTab's curated Claude Code plugins marketplace

plugins.name: tab
plugins.description: Tab, a thinking partner defined entirely in markdown. No compiled code, no dependencies — just text files that shape how Claude talks, thinks, and works with you.

plugins.name: tab-for-projects
plugins.description: Project workflow tracking — three read-only advisor agents (archaeologist, project-planner, code-reviewer) and two skills: /discuss runs the full advisor team against a goal and synthesizes one converged plan; /grind drives autonomous implementation against a grouped backlog.
